title: GigE Camera Specifications
description:
GigE Camera Specifications

GigE Camera Specifications

Item	Specification

Model	acA640-100gm

acA640-120gm	acA1300-60gm

Resolution	640 x 480	1280 x 1080

Pixel size	5.6 x 5.6	5.5 x 5.3.

Valid pixel range (mm)	3.584 x 2.688	6.784 x 5.724

Sensor size	1/4 in.	1/1.8 in.

Shutter	Global shutter	Global shutter

Power Consumption	PoE: 2.5W

DC 12V: 2.0W	PoE: 2.6W

Ambient Temperature	0 to 40 deg. C

(Surface temp. of camera chassis must be below 50 deg.C)

Ambient Relative Humidity	20 to 80% (with no condesation)

Size	Refer to the diagram

Mass	90 g (without lens)

Item	Specification

Sensor size	1/1.8 in.	1/1.8 in.

Shutter	Global shutter	Global shutter

Power Consumption	PoE: 3.6W

DC 12V: 2.1W
